texts.App:Name: NetBoilerplate
texts.RequestError: The request failed. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Login:Title: Sign in
texts.Login:Subtitle: Enter your details to continue.
texts.Login:Error: Could not sign in. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Registration:Title: Create account
texts.Registration:Subtitle: Create an account to get started.
texts.Registration:Invalid: Could not register. Check the entered details.
texts.Registration:Error: Could not register. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Home:Description: Authentication is configured. The profile request includes the access token.
texts.Home:Title: Home
texts.Home:WelcomeMessage: Authentication demo is ready. Welcome to the app!
texts.Profile:Title: User profile
texts.Profile:Subtitle: Your account details.
texts.Profile:LoadError: Could not load the profile. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Projects:Title: Manage projects
texts.Projects:Subtitle: Create projects and keep their information up to date.
texts.Projects:Empty: There are no projects yet. Create your first project.
texts.Projects:LoadError: Could not load projects. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Projects:FormHint: The name is required. A description makes work easier to find.
texts.Projects:NameMaxLength: The name must not exceed 120 characters.
texts.Projects:DescriptionMaxLength: The description must not exceed 1000 characters.
texts.Projects:TagsPlaceholder: Enter a tag and press Enter
texts.Projects:NotFound: Project not found. Refresh the list and try again.
texts.Projects:SaveError: Could not save the project. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Projects:AccessHint: For a shared project, list its users. Saving replaces the current access list.
texts.Projects:EmailsHint: Enter one email per line or separate addresses with commas.
texts.Projects:EmailsRequired: Add at least one email for a shared project.
texts.Modpacks:Title: Modpacks
texts.Modpacks:LoadError: Could not load modpacks. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Modpacks:NoProjectsHint: Create a project before uploading a modpack.
texts.Modpacks:UploadError: Could not upload the modpack. Check the file and try again.
texts.Modpacks:DownloadError: Could not download the modpack. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Modpacks:SetCurrentError: Could not set the modpack as current. Try again.
texts.Modpacks:DeleteError: Could not delete the modpack. Try again.
texts.Modpacks:DownloadFilesError: Could not load modpack files. Try again.
texts.Nodes:Title: Manage nodes
texts.Nodes:LoadError: Could not load nodes. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Nodes:SshPasswordEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
texts.Nodes:SaveError: Could not save the node. Check your connection and try again.
texts.Nodes:HealthCheckError: Could not check the connection. Try again.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftFound: The Minecraft server folder was found and saved.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftNotFound: The Minecraft server folder was not found.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftScanError: Could not find the Minecraft server folder. Check the SFTP connection and try again.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftRconActivated: RCON was enabled on port {0}. Restart the Minecraft server to apply the changes.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftRconActivationError: Could not enable RCON. Check the SFTP connection and try again.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftServerReloaded: The reload command was sent to the Minecraft server.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftServerReloadError: Could not reload the Minecraft server. Make sure RCON is enabled and try again.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftQueryActivated: Minecraft Query was enabled on port {0}. Restart the Minecraft server to apply the changes.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftQueryActivationError: Could not enable Minecraft Query. Check the SFTP connection and try again.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftQueryStatusError: Could not get the Minecraft server status. Make sure Query is enabled and the UDP port is reachable.
texts.Nodes:MinecraftPortsHealthError: Could not check the Minecraft ports. Check the remote settings and try again.
texts.NodeFiles:Title: Node files
texts.NodeFiles:UploadError: Could not upload the file. Check your connection and try again.

texts.NodeFiles:Empty: There are no files in this folder.
texts.NodeFiles:Name: Name
texts.NodeFiles:DeleteError: Could not delete the file. Check your connection and try again.
